g.text: Every arm below is a violation. A rule that passes both gates leaves
This places the 16 rules whose enforcement point the reference states
outright. The other 13 (1, 3, 4, 6 to 14, 18) are real rules, but the reference does
not yet say where each is enforced or what reason it sets, so they are not placed here
rather than guessed at. Absence from this figure is a gap in the reference, not a rule
Why the reconcile-time rules cannot be CEL.
and CEL on an Agent cannot read AgentClass (24, 26);
, which CRD validation cannot reach at any scope,
as recoverable status rather than a
blocked write (29). Agentry runs no admission webhook server, so there is no third place.
